content.content:
1	import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'
2	
3	const router = createRouter({
4	  history: createWebHistory(import.meta.env.BASE_URL),
5	  routes: [
6	    {
7	      path: '/',
8	      redirect: '/chat',
9	    },
10	    {
11	      path: '/login',
12	      name: 'login',
13	      component: () => import('@/views/Auth/LoginView.vue'),
14	      meta: { requiresAuth: false },
15	    },
16	    {
17	      path: '/register',
18	      name: 'register',
19	      component: () => import('@/views/Auth/RegisterView.vue'),
20	      meta: { requiresAuth: false },
21	    },
22	    {
23	      path: '/',
24	      component: () => import('@/components/layout/AppLayout.vue'),
25	      meta: { requiresAuth: true },
26	      children: [
27	        {
28	          path: 'chat',
29	          name: 'chat',
30	          component: () => import('@/views/Chat/ChatView.vue'),
31	          meta: { title: '智能问答' },
32	        },
33	        {
34	          path: 'graph',
35	          name: 'graph',
36	          component: () => import('@/views/KnowledgeGraph/KnowledgeGraphView.vue'),
37	          meta: { title: '知识图谱' },
38	        },
39	        {
40	          path: 'path',
41	          name: 'path',
42	          component: () => import('@/views/LearningPath/LearningPathView.vue'),
43	          meta: { title: '学习路径' },
44	        },
45	        {
46	          path: 'snippets',
47	          name: 'snippets',
48	          component: () => import('@/views/CodeSnippets/CodeSnippetsView.vue'),
49	          meta: { title: '代码片段' },
50	        },
51	        {
52	          path: 'dashboard',
53	          name: 'dashboard',
54	          component: () => import('@/views/Dashboard/DashboardView.vue'),
55	          meta: { title: '学习仪表盘' },
56	        },
57	        {
58	          path: 'profile',
59	          name: 'profile',
60	          component: () => import('@/views/Profile/ProfileView.vue'),
61	          meta: { title: '个人中心' },
62	        },
63	      ],
64	    },
65	  ],
66	})
67	
68	router.beforeEach((to) => {
69	  const token = localStorage.getItem('token')
70	
71	  if (to.meta.requiresAuth !== false && !token) {
72	    return { name: 'login', query: { redirect: to.fullPath } }
73	  }
74	
75	  if ((to.name === 'login' || to.name === 'register') && token) {
76	    return { name: 'chat' }
77	  }
78	
79	  return true
80	})
81	
82	export default router
